# Lisa Wood Studio

> Lisa Wood Studio — large-scale landscape photography, writing, and installation made through a practice of sustained attention and discomfort.

Lisa Wood Studio is the website of artist Lisa Wood — large-scale landscape photography, writing, conceptual projects, installation, and applications, made at remote field sites across volcanic, desert, winter, and ice terrain.

## Practice

To luxuriate in discomfort is to step into challenging conditions and stay there long enough for perception to change — driven by adventure, rewarded with discovery.

Lisa Wood works at remote field sites across volcanic, desert, winter, and ice terrain, returning with large-scale photographs — and with writing and installation — that ask for the same sustained attention they were made with.

## Work

### Visual

- Surface Surveys (Photography, Craters of the Moon · Idaho) — Close looking at volcanic ground — lava, ash, and broken surface — surveyed on foot at Craters of the Moon.
- Winter Blue (Photography, Camas Prairie · Idaho) — Snow, low winter light, and the long blue hour of the Camas Prairie.
- Omani Landscapes (Photography, Wahiba Sands · Oman) — The dunes and shifting desert light of the Sharqiya (Wahiba) Sands.
- Field Sites (Photography, White Sands · Greenland · Simpson Desert) — Selected work from desert, ice, and dune field sites — White Sands, Ilulissat, and the Simpson Desert.
- Totems & Sentinels (Photography) — In preparation.
- Flipped (Photography) — In preparation.

### Writing

- Luxuriate in Discomfort (Artist book, Book) — A book that takes discomfort as a working method — text and image held together.
- Lost Vibrations (White paper, White paper) — In preparation.
- A Veiled Landscape (Essay, Essay) — In preparation.
- Poetry (Writing, Collected poems) — In preparation.
- The Time of Becoming (Works in progress, Book series · in progress) — In preparation.
- The Art of Falling (Works in progress, Course · in progress) — In preparation.

### Conceptual

- This collection is in preparation.

### Installation

- Luxuriate in Discomfort (Installation view, Installation) — The book installed — mirror, heat poem, and cold poem held in a single room.
- Side Effects (Installation, Installation) — In preparation.
- ECS · Attention (Installation, Installation) — In preparation.
- 21st Century in Black & White (Installation, Installation) — In preparation.

### Applications

- This collection is in preparation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://lisawoodstudio.com/): Studio home — the full index of work across Visual, Writing, Conceptual, Installation, and Applications.
- [The Observatory](https://lisawoodstudio.com/observatory.html): The Observatory Sun Valley commission presentation — a page within the site.
